##### Any bug report or feature request raised here should be submitted according to the respective templates or it may be flagged with `Needs more information`. No action will be taken until the required context is provided.

##### For support questions or operator how-to questions, please use the project discussions/documentation path instead of filing a bug report.

<hr>

Hey there. Thanks for using OrbitDeck. Please explain the issue clearly and include reproduction steps, screenshots, logs, and environment details where relevant.

<hr>

###### DO NOT DELETE OR EDIT anything below this

<hr>

<sub><b>Note 1:</b> Make sure to add all the information needed to understand the report. If essential information is missing, the issue may be marked <code>Needs more information</code>.</sub>

<sub><b>Note 2:</b> UI/operator issues should include the affected surface, browser, platform, and whether the issue was reproduced in a fake pass or a real pass.</sub>
